generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors in Building Control System for monitoring environmental and operational conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingDataStream
]

instance BuildingDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-derived geometric model augmented with semantic data for Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT connectivity platform for real-time data ingestion and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin repository for managing digital twin instances and metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService, AnalysisService, OptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization platform for immersive monitoring and control interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of infrastructure assets for continuous status tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure maintenance needs using historical and real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation of building performance scenarios for design and operational planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance AnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comprehensive analysis of building performance metrics and operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of building operations for energy efficiency and resource allocation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time monitoring of building conditions for immediate operational awareness"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance needs based on historical and real-time data"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated scenarios for evaluating building performance under various conditions"
]

instance AnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven insights for informed decision-making in building operations"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized operational strategies for energy efficiency and cost reduction"
]

instance BuildingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure asset in AECO domain"
    base:contains BCSSensor
]

instance AECOEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing infrastructure assets for Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations lifecycle management"
    base:contains BuildingComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals transmitted to Building Control Systems via Ditto as part of bidirectional data exchange."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration, centralized hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange, and coordination among Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers roles for holistic building lifecycle management"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments, automated deployment through Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) to generate deployable artifacts, real-time operation with continuous data synchronization and interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and evolution via modular integration of custom services and analytics to adapt to changing operational needs. Stakeholders such as Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers each play specific roles across these phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluation of model fidelity is performed using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure how well the resulting Digital Twin reflects its physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical infrastructure utilizing Eclipse Hono and Ditto for interoperable real-time data exchange between physical and digital components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Model-driven framework for scalable DT deployment leveraging Unreal Engine for rich, interactive visualization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework ensures compatibility with existing AECO-specific systems and standards, including BIM, which is recognized as the standard solution in the construction industry, addressing BIM's limitations as a seamless enabler for dynamic Digital Twin deployments."
]
